use_cases: Landing page hero sections with scroll-driven image reveal animations
Portfolio or agency websites featuring full-screen imagery
Product landing pages with immersive scroll-based visual transitions
Creative showcases requiring smooth parallax-style effects
ai_summary: A full-screen hero component featuring scroll-driven clip-path animations that reveal and scale background imagery as the user scrolls. Built with Framer Motion for smooth, performant transitions. Responsive design with separate desktop and mobile background images.
